T0385.title: Sure-Win Deal
T0385.definition: 黑产用“稳吃皮”表示某项贷款业务稳定可靠、确定能下款，以此招揽合作。
T0385.description: Originating from Sichuan-Chongqing dialect, it originally meant having the upper hand or being well-connected. In loan fraud, black-market brokers use this term to package their loan services, emphasizing an extremely high approval rate to lure downstream agents or desperate borrowers. Once trapped, victims often face exorbitant fees or risk having their personal data stolen.
T0385.usageExample: Steady skin business No household registration limit, small number, come quickly.
